title: The Weekly Closeout: Reebok returns to hockey, Nordstrom Local expands
description: The athletics retailer is reentering the category through a deal with Wholesale Sports. Meanwhile, the department store is growing its footprint in California.

title: Dell: Agents drive more ecommerce traffic, but conversions lag
description:
Dell sees rising traffic from AI platforms, but the impact remains inconsistent as search continues to drive most ecommerce performance.
The post Dell: Agents drive more ecommerce traffic, but conversions lag appeared first on MarTech.

title: Richard Baker subpoenaed for communications with ex-Saks Global CEO Marc Metrick
description: A committee of unsecured creditors says the Saks Global executive chairman has rebuffed requests for information as part of the luxury retailer’s bankruptcy.

title: Dollar General bets on beauty with savings event
description: The discount retailer, which recently reported strong Q4 earnings results, is adding to a broader effort to become a beauty destination.

title: NozzlePro launches ecommerce capability for distributors
description:
NozzlePro has launched ecommerce functionality for distributors to purchase its pressure-wash nozzles. The launch went live April 1. NozzlePro is a division under SuperKlean Washdown Products. NozzlePro said the ecommerce launch allows both distributors and “end users” to browse, view list pricing and complete purchases instantly. About the NozzlePro ecommerce launch NozzlePro said its ecommerce-enabled […]
The post NozzlePro launches ecommerce capability for distributors appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Avalara adds integration with Clover for tax compliance
description:
Tax compliance software firm Avalara Inc. is further embedding its automated tax tools directly into the commerce systems used by many businesses, adding a new integration with Fiserv’s Clover. Broadly, Avalara develops software that helps businesses calculate, file and manage taxes across digital and physical sales channels. Its tools — including new artificial intelligence (AI) […]
The post Avalara adds integration with Clover for tax compliance appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Bed Bath & Beyond adds to list of acquisitions with F9 Brands deal
description:
Quickly following its acquisition of The Container Store, Bed Bath & Beyond Inc. has announced it will acquire Lumber Liquidators, Cabinets To Go and other F9 Brands’ assets. Bed Bath & Beyond expects the deal to acquire The Container Store, which it announced April 2, to close in July. The $150 million deal includes the […]
The post Bed Bath & Beyond adds to list of acquisitions with F9 Brands deal appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Amazon Pharmacy to sell Eli Lilly GLP-1 pill with same-day delivery
description:
Amazon Pharmacy has announced that it now sells a recently approved glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) medication, offering same-day delivery for it as well. The product from Eli Lilly, Foundayo, is a once-daily pill. The companies said the GLP-1 medication is a “treatment for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related medical problems.” They began selling the […]
The post Amazon Pharmacy to sell Eli Lilly GLP-1 pill with same-day delivery appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Email delivers ROI, but many teams still can’t prove it
description:
Email is crucial to business success, but many marketers still struggle to measure ROI and make the case for more investment.
The post Email delivers ROI, but many teams still can’t prove it appeared first on MarTech.

title: A 6-step AI workflow for building better seasonal campaigns
description:
Turn scattered inputs into clear campaign strategy by combining CRM data, research and structured prompting into a repeatable system.

title: Campaign Trail: Cheetos soundtracks a heist with Megan Thee Stallion, Nickelback
description: Chris Bellinger, chief creative officer at PepsiCo Foods U.S., explains how the brand and Gut Miami went big on the relaunch of Flamin’ Hot Dill Pickle snacks.

title: Wacoal America CEO retires
description: Mitchell Kauffmann will remain on the intimates brand's board as an adviser and President James Wheatley was tapped as his successor.

title: Harley-Davidson resets brand ahead of growth strategy rollout
description: The motorcycle company gets back to basics in an ad set to Willie Nelson’s “On the Road Again” that will run nationally across broadcast and streaming.

description: A weekly roundup of the biggest U.S. and global brand leadership appointments.
